Code fragment: public final TableField<TaskLabelRecord, Integer> TASK_ID = createField(DSL.name("task_id"), SQLDataType.INTEGER.nullable(false), this, "");
Explanation: The TASK_ID column references the Task table but lacks a foreign key constraint, which could lead to orphaned records and data integrity issues. Add a foreign key constraint referencing TASK_PKEY (Task.ID) to ensure referential integrity.

Using selectFrom(LABEL) fetches all columns from the LABEL table, which may retrieve unnecessary data. Consider using an explicit select() with only the required columns: LABEL.ID, LABEL.NAME, LABEL.CREATED_AT, LABEL.UPDATED_AT.

Using LIKE with wildcards on both sides ('%title%') for searching task titles performs a full table scan and cannot use indexes efficiently. Consider using a full-text search solution like PostgreSQL's tsvector/tsquery or Elasticsearch for better performance.
